name: Single Binary
desc: Self-contained, no runtime dependencies. Drop onto any CI runner and go.

name: Docker
desc: Official image on Docker Hub. Mount config, pass API keys. Any container runtime.

name: Kubernetes
desc: Helm chart included. Dispatcher as service, agents as Jobs. Scales cleanly.

name: Chat Gateway
desc: Connect Slack or Teams. Type "fix #42 in my-api" — Agent Smith does the rest.

name: Azure DevOps
desc: Pipeline task in YAML. Security scans, API scans, bug fixes — all from AzDO.

name: GitHub Actions
desc: Trigger on PR events or schedules. SARIF output for GitHub Security tab.
